channel.title: Courses on Iraivi | Celebrating Motherhood
channel.description: Recent content in Courses on Iraivi | Celebrating Motherhood

item.title: Pregnancy Wellness
item.description:
Nurture your body, mind, and baby throughout pregnancy with practical guidance on healthy living, nutrition, movement, relaxation, and emotional well-being. This session helps you stay active, build a deeper connection with your baby, and prepare both physically and mentally for a positive birth experience.

Topics Included:
  • Pregnancy nutrition
  • Healthy lifestyle habits
  • Pregnancy-safe exercises
  • Pelvic preparation
  • Breathing techniques
  • Relaxation & mindfulness
  • Prenatal bonding
  • Visualization techniques
  • Partner bonding activities
  • Preparing body and mind for birth
  • Pelvic preparation and mobility
  • Optimal fetal positioning
  • Birth-focused movement
  • Relaxation and breathing techniques
  • Building confidence for labor
  • Birth affirmations and visualization
  • Partner support strategies
  • Creating a positive birth mindset

item.title: Preparing for Birth
item.description:
Feel confident and prepared for your baby’s birth with practical guidance on labor, birth, and comfort techniques. Learn what to expect during labor, understand your options, and discover ways to manage the process with greater calm and confidence. With the right knowledge and support, you can approach childbirth as a positive and empowering experience.

Topics Included:
  • Understanding Birth Physiology
  • Recognising the Signs of Labor
  • Stages of Labor & Birth
  • Comfort Measures & Pain Management Options
  • Relaxation & Visualisation Techniques
  • Induction and Medical Interventions
  • Labor & Birth Positions
  • Creating Your Birth Preferences Plan
  • The Golden Hour After Birth
  • Delayed Cord Clamping
  • Understanding the Apgar Score
  • The Role of the Birth Partner
  • Postpartum Recovery & Healing Tips

item.title: Breastfeeding Preparation
item.description:
Prepare for a successful breastfeeding journey with practical guidance on latching, milk production, and newborn feeding patterns. Learn what to expect during the early weeks of life and how to support a healthy milk supply for your baby.

Topics Included:
  • The Golden Hour After Birth
  • Understanding Breastfeeding Basics
  • Latching Positions & Techniques
  • Understanding Milk Production
  • Supporting a Healthy Milk Supply
  • Baby’s Feeding Cues & Feeding Patterns
  • Milk Expression, Pumping & Storage
  • Common Breastfeeding Challenges & Solutions
  • Breastfeeding Myths & Facts
  • Breastfeeding in the Early Weeks
  • Returning to Work & Breastfeeding
  • Gentle Weaning and Transitioning

item.title: Fourth Trimester Care
item.description:
Prepare for a confident transition into parenthood with guidance on postpartum recovery and newborn care. Learn what to expect after birth, how to support your physical and emotional wellbeing, and gain practical knowledge to care for your baby during the early weeks of life. This session helps you feel informed, supported, and ready for the fourth trimester.

Topics Included:
  • Maternal Recovery After Birth
  • Postpartum Warning Signs
  • Baby Blues & Postpartum Mood Changes
  • Self-Care for New Mothers
  • Understanding Your Newborn
  • Newborn Care & Comfort Measures
  • Newborn Health Checks & Screenings
  • Diapering, Bathing & Umbilical Cord Care
  • Infant Massage Basics
  • Newborn Feeding & Growth Expectations
  • Safe Sleep Guidelines
  • When to Seek Medical Attention
  • Common Postpartum & Newborn Care Myths

item.title: Pregnancy to Parenthood Complete Package
item.description:
A comprehensive program designed to support you through pregnancy, birth, breastfeeding, and the early postpartum period.

What’s Included?
  • ✔ Pregnancy Wellness
  • ✔ Preparing for Birth
  • ✔ Breastfeeding Preparation
  • ✔ Fourth Trimester Care
Package Benefits
  • Personalised one-on-one online sessions
  • Evidence-based education and guidance
  • Practical tools and resources
  • Opportunity to ask questions and clarify concerns
  • Support from pregnancy through early parenthood
Investment

Individual Sessions Value: ₹5,896
Complete Package: ₹4,999

Format
  • 📍 100% Online
  • 📍 Live Interactive Sessions
  • 📍 Attend from anywhere in India or worldwide
  • 📍 Suitable for pregnant mothers and their birth partners
Additional Support Included
  • Continuous Guidance Throughout Your Pregnancy Journey
  • Two Weeks of Postpartum Support After Birth
  • Session Notes & Educational Handouts
  • Positive Pregnancy, Birth & Breastfeeding Affirmations
  • Sample Birth Preferences Plan (Birth Plan Template)
